description: Catalog-only registry for future Sovereign AGI / PSI contributions. No raw private data by default.
truthkind_rule: Catalog first. Consent before ingestion. Encrypt/minimize before storage. Test before runtime claims.

fields.contributor_hash: sha256 hash or pseudonymous contributor reference
